title: Smart TV — Won't Turn On
prerequisites: Access to the TV's power outlet
entry_conditions: Customer reports TV will not turn on

steps.customer_message: Let's check the basics first. Is the TV's power cable firmly plugged into the wall socket, and is the wall socket switched on?
steps.agent_notes: Loose power cable is a very common cause.
response_buttons: Yes, it's plugged in and switched on

steps.customer_message: Please make sure the power cable is firmly inserted into the back of the TV and into the wall socket. Also, check that the wall socket is switched on. Let me know once done.
Is there a standby light (usually red or orange) visible on the TV?
steps.agent_notes: Standby LED indicates power reaching the TV.

steps.customer_message: No standby light means the TV isn't getting power. Please try a different wall socket with a working appliance (like a phone charger) to confirm the socket is working. Then plug the TV into that socket. Does the standby light appear now?
steps.agent_notes: Distinguish between dead socket and dead TV.
steps.safety_note: Do not attempt to open or repair the power supply unit.

steps.customer_message: The TV has power but isn't turning on from standby. Try pressing the power button **directly on the TV** (not the remote) once. Does it turn on?
steps.agent_notes: Remote could be the issue — test direct power button.

steps.customer_message: The TV works! The issue is likely with your remote. Please replace the remote batteries and try again. Does the remote work now?
Let's try a soft reset. Unplug the TV from the wall socket and wait 60 seconds (this fully discharges it). Then plug it back in and try turning it on. Did it turn on?

terminal_states.message: Excellent! Your TV is working again. Let us know if you need any more help!
This looks like it may need a hardware inspection. I'm connecting you with our service team to arrange a technician visit.
Your TV works but the remote needs to be looked at. I'm connecting you with our team who can assist with a remote replacement.

escalation_conditions: No power even after socket change
